settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: We deliver pan-India within 3-5 business days. For remote areas, delivery may take 7-10 business days.

settings.question: Do you offer custom sizing?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer custom sizing at no extra charge. Share your measurements in the order notes at checkout.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer 7-day hassle-free returns on all unworn items in original condition with tags intact.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: A tracking link will be sent via SMS and email once your order is dispatched.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale?
settings.answer: Yes, for orders above 50 pieces. Write to wholesale@vamas.in for our bulk pricing catalog.
